query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.open_id,
  u.login_method,
  u.role,
  u.created_at,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as track_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as playlist_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN playlists p ON p.user_id = u.id
GROUP BY u.id
ORDER BY u.id;
